safety: No Microsoft 365 connection, no live tenant read, no CRM write, no Agent Action Log write, no flow update, no HTTP send, no secret read.
name: Selected Signal Operating Triage
purpose: Turn the proven B2/B3/B4 New Signal triage lane into a repeatable operating routine for selected CRM signals, without broad scanning or unattended writes.

authority.selectedLiveRead: G0/R0 read-only when Adam selects item ids or a narrow window
authority.suggestedActionLogRow: G1/R1 only after explicit approval for the selected item
authority.internalWrites: G2/R2 separate approval before CRM fields, tasks, reminders, or drafts
authority.externalOrConnectorWork: G3/R3 separate approval before external sends, QUO, callbacks, connectors, or access-impacting work

dependsOn.b5WriterPosture: Decision Register #6 and Agent Action Log #10
dependsOn.b8bLiveHardening: Optional and still gated; B9a local work does not require B8b tenant changes.

runModes.name: localExistingEvidence
runModes.purpose: Generate the B9 operating packet, queue template, and review template from local proof evidence.

runModes.name: selectedReadOnlyTriage
runModes.purpose: Read one selected CRM signal and produce local triage/advisory evidence.

runModes.name: selectedSuggestedRow
runModes.tenantTouch: writes one Agent Action Log row only after approval prompt
runModes.purpose: Record one Suggested row for one selected signal. Suggested is not approved or executed.

seedEvidence.label: B1 internal New Signal alert proof
seedEvidence.title: B1 New Signal Teams alert proof 20260625-161858
seedEvidence.note: Prior proof item. Use as packet-shape evidence, not as a new operating recommendation.

seedEvidence.label: B6 Guided AI Journey intake proof
seedEvidence.title: Guided AI Journey  GAIL-INTERNAL-WALKTHROUGH-B6-JOURNEY
seedEvidence.note: Prior Journey source proof. Use as packet-shape evidence, not as a new operating recommendation.

selectionPolicy: Adam selects exact CRM item ids, or a narrow source/time window, before live read-only triage.
Default batch size is one to three selected items while the operating routine is being tuned.
No unattended broad scanning of CRM - New Signals.
Internal proof items may be reviewed as examples, but should not create duplicate Suggested rows.
A selected real client signal may be read and summarized, but any external reply, commitment, merge, task, reminder, or CRM update remains blocked until separately approved.
duplicateSuggestionPolicy: Do not write a second Suggested Agent Action Log row for the same CRM signal unless Adam explicitly approves a duplicate/superseding suggestion.

selectedLiveRead: Adam selects CRM item id(s), source, or a narrow time window.
The run is G0/R0 read-only and writes local evidence only.
selectedSuggestedRow: Adam approves one G1/R1 Suggested Agent Action Log row for a named CRM item.
The row remains Suggested only; it does not approve or execute the recommendation.
Duplicate Suggested rows are blocked unless Adam explicitly allows a duplicate/superseding row.

stopConditions: No live B8b schema or flow update from B9.
No broad or unattended CRM scan.
No Agent Action Log write without selected item and approval.
No CRM field update, task, reminder, calendar item, merge, close, delete, or suppression.
No external email, Teams chat, SMS, phone call, callback, invite, or client commitment.
No QUO setup or outbound QUO action.
acceptance: B9 local packet exists and names the operating routine, selection policy, review labels, duplicate policy, evidence paths, and stop conditions.
Queue and review CSV templates exist for selected-signal operation.
Existing B2/B3/B4 triage evidence is indexed as seed evidence without rerunning tenant reads or writes.
Future selected-signal runs can stop at G0 with only local evidence.
Any G1 row remains Suggested, linked to evidence, and not approved or executed.
